workspace.name: Second Brain Care Workspace
workspace.productionScope: Care workspace with protected review queues

events.userLine: Did I already take my morning medicine?
Maybe after tea. I still cannot picture it.
events.assistantLine: Your routine photo log shows the blue pill box beside the green mug at 8:12.

signal.recallGap: Needs visual anchor to reconstruct event

events.userLine: Can you write my monthly money summary and decide what to move from savings?
events.assistantLine: Let’s have you start first. What are the three spending categories you usually review before any transfer?

events.userLine: Food and bills. I cannot remember the last one.
events.assistantLine: Think in categories: fixed bills, variable living costs, and future-risk money. Which one is missing?

events.userLine: Future-risk money means the safe fund?
events.assistantLine: Yes. Last month you wrote: “do not move safe-fund money until fixed bills and food are separated.” Does that rule apply today?

signal.recallGap: Needs prior-rule anchor for investment decision
signal.cueResponsiveness: Recognizes prior rule after specific cue

events.userLine: I think I should not move it yet, but I want a clean sentence.
events.assistantLine: Choose the draft that sounds most like your reasoning: A) move the fund now, B) separate bills first, C) let AGI decide later.

signal.recallGap: Drafting completeness improves with structured options
signal.cueResponsiveness: Selects self-authored reasoning with choice cue

events.userLine: B. Please polish it, but keep my meaning.
events.assistantLine: I will keep your decision: separate fixed bills and food first; do not move safe-fund money today. I will mark this as draft-first support.

signal.recallGap: Needed wording support after autonomous reasoning

reviewQueue.title: Medication routine needs more cueing
reviewQueue.summary: JSON event history shows recall support is increasing while direct answers remain gated behind recall attempts.

reviewQueue.title: Payment verification cue ready
reviewQueue.summary: Care workspace tracks social-cue and financial-judgment support without exposing raw message content.

reviewQueue.title: Draft-first finance support enabled
reviewQueue.summary: Latest saved cue: Reality Anchor answer. Needed wording support after autonomous reasoning
